topic:transformers_core.title: Transformer core
topic:transformers_core.claim_context: Scaled attention and parallel heads replace recurrence with content-addressed mixing.

topic:attention_softmax_lookup.title: Attention softmax lookup
topic:attention_softmax_lookup.claim_context: Softmax turns query-key scores into a probability distribution over values.

topic:dpo.title: Direct Preference Optimization
topic:dpo.claim_context: DPO directly optimizes the policy from chosen/rejected pairs relative to a reference policy.

topic:feynrl.title: FeynRL batch adaptation
topic:feynrl.claim_context: The FeynRL paper adopts an ESS-driven P3O objective; P3O is a sourced method mapping, not a synonym for FeynRL.

topic:rope.title: Rotary Position Embedding
topic:rope.claim_context: RoPE rotates query/key coordinate pairs so their attention interaction exposes relative position.
